title: PendingPushTracker + FilePushTracker + NoTracker
definition_of_done: PendingPushTracker interface, FilePushTracker persisting to .issues/state/pending-push-count, NoTracker no-op. Tests: increment/reset, persistence across instances, default threshold.
outcome: Added PendingPushTracker interface, FilePushTracker persisting to .issues/state/pending-push-count, and NoTracker no-op. Tests: increment/reset, persistence across instances, default threshold (5). All pass.

notes.msg: Scope overlap with E3 detected at claim time
